description: Kam Punia discusses the evolution of Web3 mobile gaming, focusing on the new NFT collection and its integration into the Fableborn ecosystem. He shares insights on user motivations and the lessons learned from entering the crypto space, emphasizing the importance of understanding different user personas and their needs.
topic_summary: Exploration of Web3 mobile gaming and NFT integration in Fableborn, highlighting user motivations and lessons from the crypto space [t=0:16].
